reviews.review_body: mate, someone tell the drivers to slow down,

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: It has been a pathetic expeirence with this school for my kids. There IB is fake as they still ask and expdct students to cram Tables in Mathematics. Transport facilities are even worse as the bus drops a 4 yr old kid across the main road and not at the pick up point. Teachers shout at 4-5 yr olds to create discipline. Bullying is normal in MYP classes and teachers are freshers without any knowledge of handling kids both in PYP and MYP at least. They are expanding like anyhting with more than 12 sections in each class but without the right faculty to teach. Teachers who say we were counsellors are teaching god knows what to kids of MYP program. Extremely disappointed with the school and its working style. If possible dont put your kids here.. The campus will lure you with its vast scenic beauty and facilities, but nothing concrete in the real school

reviews.author: ramyata mannava
reviews.review_body:
Can someone help me how to reach to the school staff?

I mean I am a new parent and I have been trying to approach my kid’s class teacher

reviews.author: Ajit Garcha
reviews.review_body:
My daughter is now in class 9, transitioned here mid-year from another school in class 7, and it has been a very good experience for her.

What really stands out is how the school balances academics, sports, and arts. Its a place that values all aspects of a child’s development. My daughter has had the chance to explore her interests beyond just academics, which has helped her grow in so many ways.

The student-to-teacher ratio is great. She gets plenty of individual attention, which has boosted her confidence. A special mention to her swimming coach Mr. Jacob, he is a very positive influence on all children under his wings.

The facilities are impressive, too. Everything from the classrooms to the sports areas is well-maintained and designed to support learning and creativity.

Overall, I’m really pleased with our choice. Gaudium has helped my daughter blossom into a more confident and well-rounded individual.
I see a lot of negative reviews, do not understand their grievances. I think the school is strict in adequate measure and makes children ready for the real world.

A few negative reviews say that parents and guardians are not allowed into the main campus area. Of course they are not allowed and should not be allowed. No good school should allow.

reviews.author: Varun Chinna
reviews.review_body: School is really good at maintaining education and sports. They have a huge ground and different options in sports and art. But only thing which is painful as parents is it’s looks little commercial for few events they conduct.

reviews.author: Ram Pot
reviews.review_body: Thanks for existing Gaudium. My son and me loved the IB curriculum. he mainly likes that the Gaudium has sports

reviews.review_body: The PR team acts nice in front of parents but is rude and disrespectful towards students and refuses to listen to them regarding anything
